creator: pst@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


I took an alternate approach.  Given the volatility of the imap 
software, I don't think it's reasonable to include libcclient.a 
and the include files at all, so I have removed them from the 
port.  If you want to build something that requires internal files 
from imap, then depend on the imap port source code. 

I know this change is not what you wanted.  If you'd like to have 
the default work the other way, please take over maintenance of 
IMAP and then you may do as you wish.
